input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.12.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.12.3.3
            TITLE: the tractive system active light may switch a short time after the vehicle has come to a

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.12.3.3: The Tractive System Active Light may switch a short time after the vehicle has come to a
IN.12.3.3 The Tractive System Active Light may switch a short time after the vehicle has come to a 
complete stop as the reduction of the system voltage is not immediate.  See EV.7.2.2.c

final_answer: The Tractive System Active Light may switch a short time after the vehicle has come to a complete stop as the reduction of the system voltage is not immediate. See EV.7.2.2.c
